message:
feat(core): add adaptive budget allocator with bounded slack redistribution (ft-2p9cb.1.4.1)

Implements A4 spec types for the AARSP adaptive budget allocator:
- StagePressure: headroom/deficit signals from observed vs budgeted p95
- AdaptiveAllocatorConfig: bounded rate, floor/ceiling, EWMA smoothing
- LaneAllocation: per-stage allocation state with cumulative transfer tracking
- AllocationDecision/StageAdjustment: deterministic reallocation records
- AdaptiveAllocator: core allocator with conservation, bounded rate, and replay-safe guarantees
- 24 new unit tests (172 total), all 67 proptests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
